zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathew Nugent於1821年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 高威隆福德時，他的父親James Nugent28歲，母親Bridget Carbery28歲。他於1850年7月25日與Mary Ann Hopffner在美國威斯康辛州武塔加米蕾托 特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他於1860年住在美國威斯康辛州武塔加米特且於1880年住在美國愛阿華州弗洛伊德尼爾斯 堂史普。他去世於1893年7月4日在美國明尼蘇達州賀伯特斯特萊特 利維 堂史普享年72歲，埋葬在美國明尼蘇達州賀伯特帕克 拉皮茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathew Nugent于1821年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 高威隆福德时，他的父亲James Nugent28岁，母亲Bridget Carbery28岁。他于1850年7月25日与Mary Ann Hopffner在美国威斯康辛州武塔加米蕾托 特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他于1860年住在美国威斯康辛州武塔加米特且于1880年住在美国艾奥瓦州弗洛伊德尼爾斯 堂史普。他去世于1893年7月4日在美国明尼苏达州賀伯特斯特萊特 利維 堂史普享年72岁，埋葬在美国明尼苏达州賀伯特帕克 拉皮茲。

nameMeanings.name: Nugent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin), and northern French: habitational name from any of several places in northern France, such as Nogent-le-Sec and Nogent-sur-Eure (both in Eure), Nogent-le-Phaye, Nogent-le-Roi, and Nogent-le-Rotrou (all in Eure-et-Loir), Nogent-l'Abbesse (Marne), Nogent-l'Artaud (Aisne), and in particular Nogent-sur-Oise (Oise), named with Latin Novientum, apparently an altered form of a Gaulish name meaning ‘new settlement’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name, but it was also adopted for Mag Uinseanáin (formerly Anglicized as McGunshenan, a variant of Gilsenan ), on the grounds of a fancied resemblance between Uinseanán and Uinnseadún.

History: The Anglo-Norman family of this name is descended from Fulke de Bellesme, lord of Nogent in Normandy, who was granted large estates around Winchester after the Conquest. His great-grandson was Hugh de Nugent (died 1213), who went to Ireland with Hugh de Lacy, and was granted lands in Bracklyn, County Westmeath. The family formed itself into a clan on the Irish model, of which the chief bore the hereditary title of Uinsheadun (Irish Uinnseadún), from their original seat at Winchester. They have been Earls of Westmeath since 1621. The name is now a common one in Ireland, and has been adopted there by some who have no connection with the clan.

variants.name: Newgent
meanings: Irish and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Nugent  .

variants.name: Nugen
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Nugent  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilsenan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Colm.

Irish (Meath): shortened form of MacGils(h)enan, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Seanáin ‘son of the servant or devotee of Saint Senan’. Gilsenan has sometimes been Anglicized as Gilson , and a northern Irish variant Mag Uinseanáin, formerly Anglicized as McGunshenan, has now been replaced by Nugent . Leonard has also sometimes been adopted as equivalent.

nameMeanings.name: Mathew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

historicEvents.title: Financial Relief for Public Land
historicEvents.description: A United States law to provide financial relief for the purchasers of Public Lands. It permitted the earlier buyers, that couldn't pay completely for the land, to return the land back to the government. This granted them a credit towards the debt they had on land. Congress, also, extended credit to buyer for eight more years. Still while being in economic panic and the shortage of currency made by citizens, the government hoped that with the time extension, the economy would improve.

historicEvents.title: Slavery Becomes Illegal in New York State
historicEvents.description: During the years 1799 to 1827, New York went through a period of gradual emancipation. A Gradual Emancipation Law was passed in 1799 which freed slave children born after July 4, 1799. However, they were indentured until 25 years old for women and 28 years old for men. A law passed 1817 which freed slaves born before 1799, yet delayed their emancipation for ten years. All remaining slaves were freed in New York State on July 4, 1827.
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
Historical Boundaries: 1851: Floyd, Iowa, United States
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: The First Worlds Fair in the U.S.
historicEvents.description: The First official World's Fair, was held to celebrate the 100th anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence in Philadelphia. 37 Countries provided venues for all to see.
Historical Boundaries: 1882: Cass, Minnesota, United States 1883: Hubbard, Minnesota, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Mathew Nugent was born in 1821, in Longford, County Galway, Ireland, his father, James Nugent, was 28 and his mother, Bridget Carbery, was 28. He married Mary Ann Hopffner on 25 July 1850, in Little Chute, Outagamie, Wisconsin, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. He lived in Center, Outagamie, Wisconsin, United States in 1860 and Niles Township, Floyd, Iowa, United States in 1880. He died on 4 July 1893, in Straight River Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, United States, at the age of 72, and was buried in Park Rapids, Hubbard, Minnesota, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathew Nugent est né en 1821, à Longford, County Galway, Irlande, son père, James Nugent, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Bridget Carbery, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Mary Ann Hopffner le 25 juillet 1850, à Little Chute, Outagamie, Wisconsin, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Il a vécu à Center, Outagamie, Wisconsin, États-Unis en 1860 et à Niles Township, Floyd, Iowa, États-Unis en 1880. Il est décédé le 4 juillet 1893, à Straight River Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, États-Unis, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Park Rapids, Hubbard, Minnesota, États-Unis.

Juli 1850 in Little Chute, Outagamie, Wisconsin, Vereinigte Staaten Mary Ann Hopffner geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. 1860 hat er in Center, Outagamie, Wisconsin, Vereinigte Staaten und 1880 in Niles Township, Floyd, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 4. Juli 1893 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Straight River Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Park Rapids, Hubbard, Minnesota, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathew Nugent è nato il nel 1821 nel Longford, County Galway, Irlanda, il suo padre, James Nugent, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Bridget Carbery, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Mary Ann Hopffner il 25 luglio 1850, nel Little Chute, Outagamie, Wisconsin, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Vissuto a Center, Outagamie, Wisconsin, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1860 e nel Niles Township, Floyd, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1880. Morì il 4 luglio 1893, nel Straight River Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Park Rapids, Hubbard, Minnesota, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathew Nugentが1821年にアイルランドコウントイ ガルワイロングフォードで生まれた時，父James Nugentは28歳，母Bridget Carberyは28歳であった。1850年7月25日にアメリカ合衆国ウィスコンシン州オウタガミリットル チウトでMary Ann Hopffnerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1860年にはアメリカ合衆国ウィスコンシン州オウタガミセンターに，1880年にはアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州フロイドニレス トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼は1893年7月4日にアメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ハバードストレイト リバー トウンシュイップで72歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ハバードパーク ラピズにて埋葬された。

ko.Little Chute,Outagamie Co. WI: 미국 위스콘신 주 우타갬이 리틀 c후트
ko.lifeSummary: Mathew Nugent(이)가 1821년 아일랜드 카운티 갈웨이 론그퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Nugent(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Bridget Carbery(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1850년 7월 25일 미국 위스콘신 주 우타갬이 리틀 c후트에서 Mary Ann Hopffner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 1860년도에 미국 위스콘신 주 우타갬이 세터에서, 1880년도에 미국 아이오와 주 플로이드 니레스 타운시프에서 살았다. 그는 1893년 7월 4일 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 스트레이트 라이버 타운시프에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 박 라피드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathew Nugent nasceu em 1821, em Longford, County Galway, Irlanda, seu pai, James Nugent, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Bridget Carbery, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Ann Hopffner em 25 de julho de 1850, em Little Chute, Outagamie, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele viveu em Center, Outagamie, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos da América em 1860 e em Niles Township, Floyd, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América em 1880. Ele faleceu em 4 de julho de 1893, em Straight River Township, Hubbard, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Park Rapids, Hubbard, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathew Nugent родился в 1821 г. в местности лонгфорд, коунти галвеи, Ирландия, его отцу по имени James Nugent было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Bridget Carbery, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Ann Hopffner 25 июля 1850 г. в местности литл чут, оутагэими, Висконсин, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он жил в местности кентир, оутагэими, Висконсин, Соединенные штаты в 1860 году и в местности нилесь тоуншип, флоид, Айова, Соединенные штаты в 1880 году. Он умер 4 июля 1893 г. в местности стреиит ривир тоуншип, хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности парк рапидс, хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathew Nugent nació en 1821, en Longford, County Galway, Irlanda, su papá, James Nugent, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Bridget Carbery, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Mary Ann Hopffner el 25 de julio de 1850, en Little Chute, Outagamie, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas. Vivió en Center, Outagamie, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos en 1860 y en Niles Township, Floyd, Iowa, Estados Unidos en 1880. Murió el 4 de julio de 1893, en Straight River Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Park Rapids, Hubbard, Minnesota, Estados Unidos.
